text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While strolling through the park, I run<n>into
Marvelous Sunday and Mayano<n>Top Gun taking a
quick break during<n>their jog.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous timing, Trainer! Could you<n>take a
picture of us by the pond<n>together? The water's
so sparkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yippee! Thanks, Trainer! Here, use<n>my phone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mayano slips, her phone launches<n>from her
hand and sails straight into<n>the pond's depths.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mayday, mayday... I think my phone<n>is done for...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Chin up, Mayano! In times like these,<n>you've
gotta stay positive! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Believe in the marvelous, and it'll<n>believe in you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: B-believe in the marvelous? How do I<n>do that?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Like this! To me, my woof-derful<n>friends! We need
your marvelous<n>help! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Dogs
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof! Bark, woof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From out of nowhere, dogs come<n>streaming in,
forming ranks before<n>Marvelous Sunday!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! ☆ Thanks for coming,<n>everyone! Let's
get to work! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday dives into the<n>water, quickly
followed by the canine<n>crew.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
M-Marvey?! What do we do,<n>Trainer?! She's not
coming back up!

text_block_list.name: Gray Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Whew! Mayanooo! We found it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the dog's barking, Marvelous<n>Sunday pops her
head out of the<n>water. She looks no worse for
wear.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't scare us like that, Marvey! You<n>could've
said something first!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Mayano! You looked so sad, I<n>couldn't help
myself! But now you<n>have your phone back, don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Thanks, Marvey! That was<n>suuuper
marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Now you're getting it! Say it again<n>with me:
suuuper marvelous! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Dogs
text_block_list.text: Woof!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I recognize these doggies!<n>They're the ones
you're always<n>hanging out with!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Wherever you look, the<n>world's full of
marvelous friends! ☆<n>All you've gotta do is ask,
and they'll<n>come running to help!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I guess I owe them too, don't I?<n>Thanks a ton,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
With so many paws pitching in, we<n>found your
phone in no time! Didn't<n>even get waterlogged! ☆
choice_data_list:
It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
With so many paws pitching in, we<n>found your
phone in no time! Didn't<n>even get waterlogged! ☆
choice_data_list:
It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

It's good to help your friends, but don't hurt
yourself in the process.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! And I appreciate the<n>advice! But
sometimes, you've gotta<n>go above and beyond to
be<n>marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano, can you check if your<n>phone's
working okay?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, good idea!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wow! Look at all these<n>underwater photos!
Did you take<n>these, Marvey?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I did! While I was down there, I was<n>struck by
marvelous inspiration!☆<n>Ahaha! ★ Ahahahahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I'm fi—achoo!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeep! You're shivering, Marvey!<n>We've gotta
hurry back and get you<n>changed into something
dry!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Aw, don't fret so much, Mayano. If<n>you frown too
much, your face'll get<n>stuck!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I guess we'd better hurry back so<n>that doesn't
happen—and before I<n>catch a cold! Ahaha! ★
Ahahahahaha!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday and Mayano Top<n>Gun are all
smiles as they leave, their<n>spirits undampened by
the minor<n>crisis.
